titleStmt.title: SII 9.340: original edition by R. Shama Sastry and N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 340. (A.R. No. 116 of 1913.) ON THE FOURTH SLAB SET UP IN THE COURT-YARD IN THE BHIMESVARA TEMPLE AT NILAGUNDA, SAME TALUK AND DISTRICT.

summary.p: This is dated Śaka 1145 Subhānu, [Mā]gha, śu. 11, Bṛihaspativāra corresponding to A.D. 1224 February 1 Thursday, f.d.t. ·87. It belongs to the reign of the Hoysaḷa king Narasiṁhadēva (II). His father Ballāḷa is stated to have driven out singlehanded the Sēvaṇa army from Soraṭūr up to the bank of the Kṛishṇavēṇī river, being mounted on his elephant. It registers the gift of some village (name lost) for the service of the god Bhīmēśvara.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
namastuṁgaśiraścuṁbicaṁdracāmaracāravē
trayiḷōkyanagarāraṁbhamūlastaṁbhāya
śaṁbhavē . Eraḍuṁ lakkaṁbaraṁ suttaṇayarasanisaṁnāhadiṁ pa
ṁneraḍusāviravaruśaśrīṇivolaṁ kavaṇiya maṇiya pari
yāṇadiṁ tōrkevetteytare taṁnoṁdāneyiṁ sēvuṇanripabaḷa
maṁ nūṁki beṁnaṭṭi koṁdaṁ soraṭūriṁ kriṣṇavēṇiya nadiya ta
ḍivaraṁ vīraballāḷarāyaṁ . kaliballāḷanripāḷakaṁgavadhikaiśvaryya
kaḍarpāda padumalamādēvigamaḷaṟiṁda vudayaṁgeyidaṁ narasi
ṁhādhipaṁ lalanāmōhanamūrtti kīrttiramaṇaṁ sāhityaratnākaraṁ baḷa
vadvayirinripāḷakāḷakuḷikaṁ kaḷpadrumaṁ . modalo
ḷu vikramapāḷa pāṁsaranittalukoṁda ḷbirdanākāḍavarāyanaṁ
magaranaṁ pāṁḍyanaṁ koṁdanu nāmadama paṭṭamanadaṁ cōḷaṁge muṁ
diṭu kaṭṭidanāsētuvinoḷu narasiṁhadēva staṁbhamaṁ . gadya .
svasti samastabhuvanāśrayaṁ mahārājādhirājaṁ dvārava
tīpuravarādhīśvaraṁ yaduvaṁ sarvvajñacūḍāma
ṇi malerājarājaṁ maleparoḷu vārasiddhi giridurggama
lla nissaṁkapratāpacakravartti hoysaṇa vanu nijarājadhāni
dōrasamudradoḷu sukhasaṁkathā ḷuttirddā prastāvadoḷaṁ .
śakavaruśa 1145 neya svabhānusaṁva gha su 11 bruhavāra
daṁdu noṇaṁbavāḍi mūvatti śrīmatu janamēdeya
dattiyāda Anādiyagrahāra bhīmēśvaradēvarige Aṁ
gabhōgaraṁgabhōgaupārakkaṁ sanakke mūnūrvvarigeUṁvāgi
māciyahaḷḷiya mūḍaṇaye bahaḷḷiyanu dhārāpū
rvvakaṁ māḍikoṭṭu Ā dharmmavanu mūnūrbbaru dēvara śrīkāryyava na
ḍasuvaru . priyadiṁdiṁtidaneIde kāyiva puruśaṁgāyuṁ
jayaśrīyumakke yidaṁ kāyade kāyiva pāpige kurukṣētraṁgaḷoḷ
vāraṇāśiyoḷeḷkōṭimunīṁdraraṁ kavileyaṁ vēdāḍhyaraṁ ko
ṁdudoṁduyaśaṁ porddugumeṁdu sāṟidapudī śaiḷākṣaraṁ dhātriyo
ḷū . svadattāṁ paradattāṁ vā yō harēti vasuṁdharāṁ śaṣṭirvaruṣasaha
srāṇi viṣṭāyāṁ jāyatē krimiḥ . maṁgaḷa mahāśrī śrīśrīśrī
Digital edition of SII 9.340 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
